auth.termsNotice: By signing up, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
auth.resetDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.resetLinkSent: We sent a password reset link to your email.
auth.resetLinkSentTo: We sent a password reset link to {email}. Click it to set a new password.
auth.confirmationSentTo: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click it to activate your mirror.
auth.chooseStrongPassword: Choose a strong password for your account.
auth.passwordUpdatedDesc: Your password has been reset successfully.
auth.linkExpired: If this takes too long, your reset link may have expired.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.

journal.title: Journal
journal.emptyDescription: Start writing your first journal entry. Lao Mo is waiting to learn about you.
journal.guidedDescription: Lao Mo guides you through 5-7 rounds of deep reflection. Best for uncovering hidden patterns.
journal.freewriteDescription: Write freely without structure. AI extracts insights when you save.
journal.chooseMode: Choose how you want to write today
journal.saveFailed: Failed to save journal entry. Please try again.
journal.guidedGreeting: What's sitting heaviest on your mind right now? Don't filter it. Just say it.
journal.guidedPreviewDescription: Review the extracted title, transcript, summary, and tags before saving.
journal.guidedPreviewEmpty: Say something in the guided session before preparing a preview.
journal.guidedPreviewFailed: Failed to prepare the guided preview. Please try again.
journal.writePrompt: Start writing. Don't filter, don't edit. Just let it flow...
journal.separateItems: Separate items with commas or new lines
journal.guidedReflectionHint: Lao Mo is guiding your reflection
journal.freewriteSaveHint: Write freely. AI will extract insights when you save.
journal.aiReadyDescription: {provider} is active with {model}. Free accounts currently get {count} guided chat sessions per day.
journal.aiUnavailableDescription: No server AI provider is configured yet. Add ANTHROPIC_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY first, then guided chat will unlock.

chat.empty: Start writing. Lao Mo is listening.

tree.title: Destiny Tree
tree.subtitle: Your life choices visualized as a living tree
tree.emptyDescription: Write a few journal entries and your Destiny Tree will begin to grow. Each major decision, crisis, and breakthrough becomes a branch.
tree.loadFailed: Failed to load your Destiny Tree
tree.showingLimited: Showing {nodeCount} of {totalNodeCount} life nodes on the free plan. Upgrade to Pro to unlock the full tree{limitText}.
tree.saveNodeFailed: Failed to update the life node

profile.title: Cognition Profile
profile.subtitle: Your thinking patterns, behavior archetypes, and habit loops
profile.notEnoughDescription: Write at least 3-5 journal entries to unlock your full cognition profile.
profile.thinkingDescription: How many angles you see when facing a problem
profile.levelDescription0: You have just begun. Write your first entry to start the journey.
profile.levelDescription1: The seed is planted. Keep writing to unlock pattern detection.
profile.levelDescription2: You can now see patterns forming. The AI is learning your themes.
profile.levelDescription3: You have acknowledged a cycle. The hardest step is done.
profile.levelDescription4: You chose differently when the loop came back. Real change.
profile.levelDescription5: A new behavior held for 30 days. The root is deepening.
profile.levelDescription6: Three cycles broken. You are the mirror now.
profile.microActionsDescription: Trackable interventions generated from your current cognition profile
profile.upgradeL1: Start asking "what else might be causing this?" to move from point thinking to linear thinking.
profile.upgradeL2: Ask "are A, B, C affecting each other?" to move from linear to systemic thinking.
profile.upgradeL3: Look for the leverage point, the one thing that shifts the whole system.
profile.upgradeL4: You see the structure. Now help others see it too.

cognition.levelL2: Sees one cause-effect chain. "A -> B -> C"
cognition.levelL3: Multiple factors interacting. "A, B, C affect each other"
cognition.levelL4: Sees structural patterns and leverage points

chapters.title: Life Chapters
chapters.subtitle: AI-generated chapters of your life story
chapters.proDescription: Chapter generation is available on Pro. Keep journaling and upgrade when you want your entries grouped into larger narrative arcs.
chapters.emptyDescription: You currently have {count} journal entries. Chapters are generated automatically every 15 chronological entries, then linked back to matching destiny-tree nodes.

patternAlert.title: Pattern Alert
patternAlert.description: These are not random echoes. This journal entry lines up with loops your history already exposed.
patternAlert.headline: This entry reactivated {count} known loops.
patternAlert.fallbackBody: You've been here before. The mirror sees the loop.

landing.heroDescription: FateMirror uses AI to detect your life patterns, diagnose the thinking behind them, and confront you with your own words when you loop again.
landing.featurePatternsDesc: AI scans your journals for recurring themes, decisions, and emotional cycles.
landing.featureCognitionDesc: Diagnose your thinking level (L1-L4), behavior archetypes, and hidden habit loops.
landing.featureTreeDesc: Watch your life choices grow into a visual tree. Red links reveal the loops.
landing.showcaseDesc: AI-powered journaling that detects your patterns, diagnoses your thinking, and helps you break the loop.
landing.showcaseTree: Your life choices grow into a visual tree

pricing.headline: Break your loops with the pricing model defined in the PRD.
pricing.description: FateMirror keeps the free tier generous enough to prove value, then unlocks the full reflection system through Pro monthly or yearly access with a high guided-session allowance instead of uncapped usage.
pricing.lockedMessage: Your {plan} access is still active. Renewal checkout will unlock after the current period expires.
pricing.proChange1: 300 guided conversations per month for real interruption without uncapped cost risk.
pricing.proChange2: Full Destiny Tree expansion instead of the free tier preview cap.
pricing.proChange3: Loop warnings, chapters, the full progression system, and a future BYOK path for power users.
pricing.paypalPanelHint: Choose monthly or yearly in the checkout panel above to activate Pro with the official PayPal buttons.
pricing.faq1Answer: The current rollout uses PayPal Orders so monthly and yearly Pro checkout can match the product model in the PRD.
pricing.faq2Question: Do I need a card to try FateMirror?
pricing.faq2Answer: No. The free tier still lets you sign up, journal, and see your early pattern map before paying.
pricing.faq3Answer: After PayPal approval, FateMirror captures the order server-side and upgrades the signed-in account to Pro automatically.

plans.freeDescription: Build the habit, capture your patterns, and see whether FateMirror fits your process.
plans.proEyebrow: Launch offer for the first 500 members
plans.proDescription: Unlock the full reflection loop for $9.9/month or $79/year with 300 guided sessions per month instead of an uncapped plan. Early supporters can claim the $6.9/month launch offer.
plans.proFeature5: Full level progression system and BYOK-ready roadmap
plans.proFeature6: Data export, early feature access, and future add-on packs

billing.signinFirst: Sign in first, then use the official PayPal buttons to activate Pro.
billing.notAvailable: {label} is not available for this browser or PayPal account.
billing.activeUntil: Your Pro access is active until {date}. Checkout unlocks after it expires.
billing.activeNoDate: Your Pro access is currently active. Checkout unlocks after it expires.
billing.onPro: You are on Pro. Future PayPal captures for this account will keep using the same checkout flow.

billingPages.paymentCaptured: Payment captured. Your Pro access is active now.
billingPages.cancelDescription: You can return to pricing or settings and restart checkout whenever you are ready.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Privacy, subscription, and preferences
settings.billingSuccess: Checkout completed. Your PayPal payment was captured and your Pro access is active.
settings.billingLocked: Your Pro access is still active. A new PayPal checkout will only unlock after the current period expires.
settings.privacy1: We never read your journals. We never sell your data.
settings.privacy2: All data is encrypted in transit and at rest via Supabase.
settings.privacy3: AI providers (Anthropic/OpenAI) do not use API data for training.
settings.guidedSessionsMonthly: Guided chat sessions included per month: {count}
settings.noSubscription: No PayPal-backed subscription record exists yet.
settings.languageDescription: Switch the interface language for this browser immediately.
settings.aiDescription: Lao Mo runs on server-managed models. This page shows whether the mirror is ready and what has to be configured.
settings.aiManagedKeys: This project currently reads AI keys from server environment variables.
settings.aiUsingBrowserKey: This browser has a saved personal API key, so Lao Mo can run even if the server-managed key is unavailable.
settings.aiNoBrowserKey: You can now add a per-browser API key below, or keep using the server-managed default.
settings.aiSetupHint: To enable Lao Mo, configure one of these server variables first: {vars}
settings.customAiDescription: Use your own provider and model in this browser. Saved locally only.
settings.customAiLocalOnly: This form is stored in your browser localStorage. Keys are sent to the server only when you start a chat request.
settings.customAiHint: OpenAI, Kimi, DeepSeek, and OpenRouter use OpenAI-compatible chat endpoints. Gemini and Claude use their native APIs.

dataControls.deleteConfirm: Delete your FateMirror account and all associated data? This cannot be undone.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.body1: FateMirror is a journaling and self-reflection product. It is not therapy, medical advice, or emergency support.
terms.body2: You are responsible for the content you submit and the decisions you make based on the product output.
terms.body3: Paid upgrades are currently handled through PayPal checkout and can affect access to premium features.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.body1: FateMirror stores your journals, analysis results, and billing metadata so the product can operate.
privacy.body2: We do not sell your journal data. We send journal text to configured AI providers only to generate responses and analysis.
privacy.body3: You can export your data or permanently delete your account from Settings.
